requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and OSARTEC / OSN Evidence

summary.en: EVSE safety evidence for El Salvador should be organized around IEC 61851-1 for conductive charging general requirements and IEC 61851-23 for DC EV supply equipment where DC fast charging is supplied. OSARTEC / OSN conformity should be checked for any Salvadoran technical regulation or adopted standard applicable to electrical equipment, plugs, cables, enclosures, labelling, or conformity assessment. In the absence of a confirmed EVSE-specific official rule, project owners and utilities may still require IEC-family reports, enclosure protection evidence, installation instructions, and Spanish-language safety labelling.
summary.zh: 萨尔瓦多EVSE安全证据应围绕IEC 61851-1传导充电通用要求及适用于直流快充设备的IEC 61851-23整理。应核查OSARTEC / OSN是否存在适用于电气设备、插头、电缆、外壳、标签或合格评定的萨尔瓦多技术法规或采标标准。在未确认存在EVSE专项官方规则的情况下，项目业主和公用事业单位仍可能要求IEC体系报告、外壳防护证据、安装说明和西班牙语安全标签。
summary.zht: 薩爾瓦多EVSE安全證據應圍繞IEC 61851-1傳導充電通用要求及適用於直流快充設備的IEC 61851-23整理。應核查OSARTEC / OSN是否存在適用於電氣設備、插頭、電纜、外殼、標籤或合格評定的薩爾瓦多技術法規或採標標準。在未確認存在EVSE專項官方規則的情況下，項目業主和公用事業單位仍可能要求IEC體系報告、外殼防護證據、安裝說明和西班牙語安全標籤。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
OSARTEC / OSN Salvadoran technical regulation or adopted-standard review where applicable

summary.en: China's comparable design baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, with China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. A China GB/T report can support engineering review but is not direct proof of IEC 61851 conformity or Salvadoran conformity assessment acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国可比设计基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，其中包含中国特有接口、信号和通信要求。中国GB/T报告可支持工程审查，但不能直接证明IEC 61851符合性或萨尔瓦多合格评定接受状态。
summary.zht: 中國可比設計基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，其中包含中國特有接口、信號和通訊要求。中國GB/T報告可支持工程審查，但不能直接證明IEC 61851符合性或薩爾瓦多合格評定接受狀態。

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851 clause matrix, IEC safety test reports, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence where applicable, IP and mechanical-impact evidence, protective-device ratings, Spanish manuals and warnings, and a statement mapping any GB/T evidence to IEC clauses. Confirm with OSARTEC / OSN and the project owner whether a local certificate, accredited test report, or supplier declaration is required.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851逐条矩阵、IEC安全测试报告、适用时的直流站IEC 61851-23证据、IP及机械冲击证据、保护器件额定值、西班牙语说明书和警示，以及将GB/T证据映射至IEC条款的说明。应向OSARTEC / OSN及项目业主确认是否需要本地证书、认可测试报告或供应商声明。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851逐條矩陣、IEC安全測試報告、適用時的直流站IEC 61851-23證據、IP及機械衝擊證據、保護器件額定值、西班牙語說明書和警示，以及將GB/T證據映射至IEC條款的說明。應向OSARTEC / OSN及項目業主確認是否需要本地證書、認可測試報告或供應商聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — mandatory where Salvadoran technical regulations, adopted standards, tender documents, utility requirements, or site-owner specifications require IEC-family safety evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 or Salvadoran conformity evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB/T 18487 as a design reference only. El Salvador-facing files should be mapped to IEC 61851 and checked against OSARTEC / OSN and project-owner conformity requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 18487只能作为设计参考。面向萨尔瓦多的资料应映射至IEC 61851，并在出货前核查OSARTEC / OSN和项目业主的合格评定要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 18487只能作為設計參考。面向薩爾瓦多的資料應映射至IEC 61851，並在出貨前核查OSARTEC / OSN和項目業主的合格評定要求。
